arts.ttl: Real Madrid trio to return to starting XI for Girona clash
arts.sum: Three members of Carlo Ancelotti’s Real Madrid squad are in line to return to the club’s starting line-up for their upcoming meeting with Girona. That’s according to Miguel Ángel Díaz…

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester United trying to sign wonderkid wanted by Real Madrid, he's set to train at Carrington
arts.sum: Some of the world's biggest clubs are after him!

arts.ttl: Man United, Real Madrid 'given major boost' in Alphonso Davies pursuit as agent's 'anger' is revealed
arts.sum: Manchester United and Real Madrid are allegedly given hope in their pursuit of Bayern Munich defender Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: All the FIFA Club World Cup games revealed: Real Madrid, Inter Miami, PSG, Atlético...
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid’s grouping with Seattle means their games will primarily take place on the West Coast (Los Angeles and Seattle), resulting in greater travel and time zone adjustments. Real Madrid will make their debut against Al Hilal on June 18 in Miami at 3 p.m. ET.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid trio pull out of squad to face Girona at last minute
arts.sum: Three members of the Real Madrid squad named to take on Girona have on Saturday been forced to withdraw. The trio in question? Rodrygo, Chema, and Gonzalo García. Real Madrid…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid suffer injury blow before Girona match
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti lost three players to injury ahead of Saturday evening's league meeting with Girona.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid suffer major injury blow ahead of La Liga showdown with Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid suffer a late blow ahead of Saturday's La Liga clash against Girona, with Brazilian forward Rodrygo ruled out due to 'a muscular issue'.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid Therapy Session
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Mehedi Hassan discuss: Kylian Mbappe’s performance before getting injured before the Atletico Madrid game

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid ready to test Man United resolve over unsellable star player
arts.sum: Real Madrid are exploring the market for new defensive signings. The La Liga champions are currently on the lookout for defensive options after a number of their players suffered serious injuries. The likes of David Alaba, Eder Militao and Dani Carvajal are all out with long term injuries while losing Nacho Fernandez in the summer […] The post Report: Real Madrid ready to test Man United resolve over unsellable star player appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Vinícus Jr. could be on his way out of Real Madrid – here’s where he might end up
arts.sum: Rumours have long been circulating linking Brazilian superstar Vinícius Jr. to a departure from Real Madrid. Last summer, rumours were circulating linking him to a move to Saudi Arabia. Now,…
